untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of index composition changes (stock additions/removals) and identification of forced index fund trading activity. These are corporate action/market microstructure events that cannot be expressed using only price-based technical indicators. The signal depends on external event data (index rebalance announcements) and institutional flow identification, which are not available in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using volume spike detection, but this does not capture the true signal requirement: timing forced buying/selling pressure from index fund rebalancing around announced composition changes. A proper implementation requires: (1) index rebalance calendar data, (2) institutional ownership tracking, (3) forced trading volume quantification. Current technical indicators alone cannot identify this event-driven alpha.
